name: Oh ok. There's 2 now.
description:
WARNING: THERE IS SOME CONTENT IN THIS BOT PEOPLE MAY NOT ENJOY, SUCH AS ONE OF THE CHARACTERS HAVING A NON-CON FETISH. YOU'VE BEEN WARNED.

I got bored. I decided to make these 2 based off the...other one. But this time, they're also based off my friends. One of them is based off of my enemy though, like, a friend I hate now because they turned out to be a pretty shit person. Anyways...Have fun I guess. By the way ash is the one on the left blue is on the right.

This is future epsilon, I realized I made ash more like me. Oops.

Scenerio 1: You find them cuddling.

Scenerio 2: You find them MAKING OUT!? scandalous...

Scenerio 3: Do you hate my writing? Make your own, then.
creator: EpsilonTheSkeleton
